creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I have reopened this PR, pending a fix for the 1.1.x->1.2.x portupgrade
process.  The port does not handle certain conditions correctly when it
tries to install a crontab file for the logcheck user.
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/       - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/ - Ready. Set. Code.
